issues.title: Damage spike: enemy dealt 12 dmg (55% of 22 HP) on floor 2
issues.description: At turn seq 172 (floor 2, encounter 0, turn 15), the enemy dealt 12 damage when the player had 22 HP. This is 55% of the player's current HP, exceeding the 50% spike threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 12 damage (55% of player's 22 HP)

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 2, encounter 0 (crystal_golem) — impatient profile
issues.description: The impatient player was defeated by crystal_golem (common) on floor 2, encounter 0 after 17 turns. They dealt 69 damage but took 108. Accuracy was 64.6%.

evidence.metric: Defeated on floor 2 by crystal_golem (108 damage taken)

issues.suggestedFix: Scale early floor difficulty more gradually

issues.title: Difficulty spike: crystal_golem on floor 2 took 17 turns (prev floor avg: 6.0)
issues.description: Encounter 0 on floor 2 against crystal_golem (common) required 17 turns to resolve, which is 2.8x the previous floor's average of 6.0 turns. This exceeds the 2x threshold for difficulty spikes. The player dealt 69 damage and took 108.
issues.suggestedFix: Review crystal_golem HP/damage scaling for floor 2; consider smoother difficulty curve for common enemies

issues.title: Dead turn: player played 0 cards on floor 2, encounter 0, turn 12
issues.description: On turn 12 of encounter 0 (floor 2), the player ended their turn without playing any cards. This could indicate AP exhaustion, empty hand, or a stuck state. Hand size was 5 and AP was 3.
